result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability, checking manifold integrity, open edges, degenerate triangles, non-manifold edges, and face normal consistency.

manifest.name: STL Batch Validator
manifest.description: Batch validates ASCII STL files for manufacturing: checks parse errors, degenerate triangles, inverted normals, open edges, and non-manifold edges; writes validation_report.json.
